meta.siteTitle: claude-checkup — How well do you use Claude?
meta.siteDesc: Free Claude Code proficiency check, skill catalog, and a daily Claude newsletter. We collect only counts and settings flags — never your file contents.
meta.homeTitle: Claude Code proficiency check — how well do you use Claude?
meta.homeDesc: Scan your installed skills, agents, hooks, and automations to grade how well you use Claude Code. Free and read-only — only counts and settings flags are collected.
meta.catalogTitle: Claude Code skill catalog, 569 entries — sorted by use case with install commands
meta.catalogDesc: 569 Claude Code skills, agents, and plugins organized by use case (orchestration, security, testing, frontend, SEO, and more). Names, descriptions, and install commands on one screen.
meta.pricingDesc: claude-checkup pricing. The check and newsletter are free; the tailored improvement plan and weekly re-check are a Pro subscription.

hero.subtitle: We scan your installed skills, agents, hooks, and automations and grade how well you use Claude Code. We surface the features you're missing and hand you the exact commands to fix them.

score.sectionDesc: Get your own report card just like the example above. Just run the scanner locally — that's it.

scanner.runNote: Read-only · sent only after you consent
scanner.howto: Clone the repo and run the command above. It shows you exactly what will be collected in the terminal, asks for consent (y/N), then sends the results. When it's done, your results page opens.
scanner.trustStrong: Collected: counts and settings flags only.
scanner.trustRest: File contents and names are never sent. Your skill list and code never reach the server.

demo.badgeRest: Get your own score below in under a minute.
demo.recsHeading: What this user should fix now
demo.recsSub: For each feature they're missing, here's a ready-to-use pick and its install command.

subscribeHome.heading: Daily Claude news, free
subscribeHome.body: New skills, updates, and usage tips, curated and sent once a day. You can subscribe without taking the check.

subscribe.ok: You're subscribed. We'll send you the Claude newsletter.
subscribe.errGeneric: Sign-up failed. Please try again in a moment.
subscribe.errNetwork: Network error. Please try again in a moment.

pricingCta.note: Need a tailored improvement plan and weekly re-checks?

pricing.subtitle: The check and newsletter stay free. Subscribe only when you want to track your progress systematically.
pricing.proNote: We'll tell you the moment it opens. Just leave your email.
pricing.footNote: Payments aren't open yet. Join the waitlist and we'll notify you first once plans are finalized.
pro: Tailored improvement plan (based on your gaps)

catalog.subtitle: Find skills by use case to shore up the weaknesses from your check. Copy the install command and apply it right away.
catalog.origNotice: Skill descriptions are shown in their original language (English/Korean).
catalog.mpTitle: Installation tricky? This one line does it
catalog.mpBodyPre: Paste the command below into Claude Code once, and from then on
catalog.mpBodyPost: and it's done. An official repo with vetted skills only.
catalog.mpListPre: Included: prompt-master · korea-public-data · repo-shipper — more added continuously ·
catalog.emptyBody: We're preparing the skill catalog data. Check back shortly for a searchable list of skills.
catalog.noItems: No entries in the catalog yet.
catalog.searchPlaceholder: What do you want to do? e.g. PPT, scraping, blog, automation
catalog.ucSub: Find skills by what you want to do. Type a use case into the search box above and recommendations appear.

result.gapsHeading: Fill these to raise your score
result.gapsSub: The highest-impact features you've been missing, in order.
result.skipSub: Areas where you have no relevant service or that are low priority. Fill them when the need arises.
result.subBody: New skills and usage tips, curated and sent once a day.
result.notFoundBody: The result has expired or the address doesn't exist. Results are stored temporarily and disappear after a while. Run the scanner again for a fresh report.

footer.trust: Collected: counts and settings flags only. File contents and names are never sent.

recBadge.builtin: Built into Claude Code — no install

grade.S: A power user who truly commands Claude
grade.A: You're doing great. Fill one or two spots to reach the top
grade.B: Solid fundamentals. You're leaking points on automation and delegation
grade.C: You use it for coding but miss half the features
grade.D: Chat-level usage. Huge room to improve
grade.F: Just getting started. Fill these in the order below

improve.basics: Open a real project and work across sessions. File-based work sticks better than chat.
improve.customize: Put hooks in settings.json and a CLAUDE.md at your project root, and repeated instructions disappear.
improve.skills: Pick a skill in the catalog that matches your frequent tasks and copy its install command.
improve.agents: Delegate heavy work to subagents to keep your main context light.
improve.model: Assign models by task difficulty — a light model for chores, a strong one for design.
improve.browser: Attach a Playwright/browser MCP to verify your UI visually and confirm with screenshots.
improve.memory: Persist context in files with memory/ and layered CLAUDE.md so work continues even when the chat breaks.
improve.automation: Automate formatting, testing, and digests with hooks and cron/workflows.
improve.orchestration: Direct multiple agents in parallel with team/workflow skills to raise throughput.
improve.integration: Connect the external tools you need as MCP servers to save a lot of manual effort.
improve.fallback: Find the relevant skill and settings in the catalog and apply them.

recTip.basics.플랜 모드: Shift+Tab before a big task — approve the plan, then execute
recTip.basics.superpowers: A skill pack for brainstorming, TDD, and debugging discipline
recTip.customize.CLAUDE.md: A rules file at your project root — applied automatically every session
recTip.customize.훅(hooks): Automate formatting and checks on save
recTip.skills.insane-search: A reader that breaks through blocked sites (Reddit, X, YouTube, etc.)
recTip.skills.caveman: Cuts output tokens by 65% — code and errors stay intact
recTip.skills.taste-skill: Escape templated, AI-looking UI — a frontend design skill
recTip.agents.서브에이전트 위임: Say "do these two tasks in parallel with subagents"
recTip.model.모델 전환: Top model for heavy design, Haiku for chores
recTip.browser.Playwright MCP: Claude opens a real browser to click and verify with screenshots
recTip.memory.# 메모리: Say "remember this" in chat to store it permanently
recTip.automation.백그라운드 실행: Send long builds to the background and keep working
recTip.orchestration.병렬 에이전트: Run independent tasks at once + cross-check with a verifier agent
recTip.integrations.MCP 서버: Connect external tools like GitHub and Slack
